name: Power Assimilation
description: Boosts your Anomaly Power by 254,508 for each Elite present on the battlefield.
source: * Boots of the Reforged * Cranium of a Lost Creature * Marshal's Waistcloth

name: Purity
description: Reduces the duration of negative statuses by 75%.

name: Quartermaster
description: Fixing Wave: Activating the skill replenishes the current weapon magazine for you and your allies. (Cooldown: 1s)

name: Quick Iron
description: After every 3 critical shots with sidearms you can instantly reload your clip. Bonus is lost upon switching weapons or if the sidearm was reloaded before achieving the bonus.

name: Radiation Splash
description: Reloading causes a small explosion that inflicts Vulnerable and deals 368 314 damage to enemies within a 5 meter radius. (Cooldown: 6s)

name: Ravenous Locust
description: Shots create a swarm of locusts, dealing 6,065,250 damage over 6 seconds and inflicting Weakness. The swarm affects all enemies within a 6 meter radius of the target while it lasts. (Cooldown: 6s)
source: This mod can be found on: * Molten Eidola

name: Ready For Anything
description: 5% of Critical Damage dealt to Elites is returned to you as Health.

name: Rocket Man
description: Tool of Destruction: You can shoot 3 additional rockets.

name: Sanctuary
description: Successful shots generate a short protective sphere effect around the player that reduces incoming Weapon Damage by up to 30% and Anomaly Damage by up to 30%

name: Sandstorm
description: Shots conjure a sandstorm, dealing 331 159 damage over 5 seconds. (Cooldown: 5s)

name: Scrap Grenade
description: First shot after reload becomes an Anomaly projectile, dealing 264 281 damage in a 5 meter radius. (Cooldown: 3s)

name: Self-Medication
description: Increase your Max Health by 20% when any skill starts its Cooldown. Stacks up to 3 times, each stack lasting 5 seconds.

name: Shadow Comet
description: Shots call down a comet, dealing 231 004 damage to enemies within a 3.5 meter radius. (Cooldown: 3s)

name: Sharp Eye
description: Critical shots while aiming down sights grants you 232,665 Firepower for 5 seconds. Stacks up to 3 times.

name: Shatter
description: Deal 16% more damage against enemies afflicted by Freeze.

name: Shock and Awe
description: When an enemy hits you with a Melee attack, every target within a 10 meter radius is struck by Anomaly lightning that deals X damage. (Cooldown: 8s)

name: Singularity
description: Killing shots create an Anomaly singularity. When destroyed, the singularity explodes dealing 7,575,580 damage to enemies within a 6.5 meter radius. (Cooldown: 6s)
source: This mod can be found on Grim Marrow.

name: Special Delivery
description: Tool of Destruction: Increase the rockets' explosion radius by 33%.

name: Splash Boost
description: Blighted Rounds: Increases the splash effect radius of successful shots by 50%.

name: Stare Into the Barrel
description: Boosts your Firepower by 174,444 for each enemy in Close Range. Stacks up to 4 times.

name: Stigmatized
description: Successful shots inflict Toxic and mark the target for 5 seconds. Killing a marked target causes them to explode dealing X damage in a 6 meter radius and marks the enemies caught in the explosion. (Cooldown: 5s)

name: Strings of Gauss
description: Shots link up to 5 enemies in a 10 meter radius of the target and deal 3,028,250 electric damage to each of them. (Cooldown: 2s)

name: Supercollider
description: Entering cover creates a forcefield that increases the damage of your and your allies' bullets that pass through it by 25%.

name: Tactical Retreat
description: Rolling creates an Anomaly orb that detonates in proximity to an enemy or when shot by the player dealing 3,648,020 damage within a 5 meter radius. (Cooldown: 8s)

name: Tainted Blood
description: Increases the damage dealt to enemies afflicted with Bleed by 16%.
source: This mod can be found on Seismic Commander's Leg Armor.

name: Target Rich Enviroment
description: Critical shots ricochet to 5 enemies within a 12 meter radius. Ricochets deal 30% of the initial shots damage. (Cooldown: 3s)

name: Telefrag
description: Killing an enemy with a critical shot teleports you to the target's location, dealing 1,578,610 damage and applying Slow to enemies within a 5 meter radius for 2 seconds. (Cooldown: 1s)

name: Thunder's Legacy
description: You become charged with Anomaly lightning, dealing 4,728,830 damage every 8 seconds to 3 enemies within a 10 meter radius. (Cooldown: 8s)

name: Til Death Do Us Part
description: Successful shots connect you to an enemy healing you for 18,205 and dealing 608,684 damage to the enemy every 0.5 seconds. The effect lasts 4 seconds. (Cooldown: 4s)

name: To the Bone
description: Blighted Rounds: When the skill is activated, increase Anomaly Power by 30% for 15 seconds.

name: Trap Cluster
description: Scrapnel: Doubles the number of mines that can be thrown before triggering the cooldown.

name: Turrets With Benefits
description: Cryo Turret: Deployed turret is surrounded with a 10 meter Anomaly sphere that grants you and your allies a 15% Resistance bonus. Every 6 seconds a random status will be removed from you and your allies within the sphere.

name: Twins
description: Cryo Turret: Two turrets can be placed before triggering the Cooldown

name: Ultimate Anomaly Surge
description: Critical shots spawn an Anomaly energy blast that deals 110 656 damage in a 2 meter radius. (Cooldown: 1s)

name: Ultimate Ashen Bullets
description: Shots inflict Ash on enemies. (Cooldown: 1s)

name: Ultimate Bleeding Bullets
description: Shots inflict Bleed on enemies. (Cooldown: 1s)
source: This mod can be found on: * The Bulwark

name: Ultimate Bone Shrapnel
description: Criticial Shots detonate the enemy's bones and turning them into shrapnel that deals 3,546.480 damage and inflicts Bleed on enemies within a 5 meter radius. (Cooldown: 3s)
source: This mod can be found on Spirit Hunter.

name: Ultimate Burning Bullets
description: Shots inflict Burn on enemies. (Cooldown: 1s)

name: Ultimate Damage Link
description: Shots link up to 4 enemies, sharing 40% of their Weapon Damage dealt and 20% of their Anomaly Damage dealt. (Cooldown: 1s)
source: This mod can be found on Voodoo Matchmaker.

name: Ultimate Freezing Bullets
description: Shots inflict Freeze on enemies. (Cooldown: 1s)
source: This mod can be found on: * Absolute Zero

name: Ultimate Stiffening
description: Shots inflict Slow on enemies. (Cooldown: 1s)
source: This mod can be found on: * Time Ripper

name: Ultimate Storm Whip
description: Shots bring down lightning on an enemy dealing 5,403,300 damage. (Cooldown: 3s)

name: Ultimate Toxic Bullets
description: Shots inflict Toxic on enemies. (Cooldown: 1s)

name: Ultimate Vulnerability Bullets
description: Shots inflict Vulnerable on enemies. (Cooldown: 1s)

name: Ultimate Weakening Bullets
description: Shots inflict Weakness on enemies. (Cooldown: 1s)

name: Under Pressure
description: Being afflicted by any status grants 216,696 Armor and 4% of Resistance every 1 second. Stacks 5 times.

name: Vaccinated
description: Receive 20% less damage when afflicted by a Burn, Toxic, or Bleed.

name: Violent Rupture
description: Shots create a volcanic explosion, dealing up to 5,320,000 damage within a 6 meter radius. (Cooldown: 5s)

name: Virulent Compound
description: Deal 10% more damage to Elites afflicted by Toxic or Blightfire. Afflicted Elites explode when killed, dealing X damage and spreading the status to other enemies within a 5 meter radius.

name: Weakness Trap
description: Shots cause explosions, dealing 3,167,140 damage and inflicting Weakness on enemies within a 5 meter radius of the target. (Cooldown: 3s)
source: This mod can be found on: * Rarog's Gaze

name: Weightlessness
description: Shots inflict Time Rift on enemies. Time Rift raises the enemy into the air for 5 seconds. (Cooldown: 1s)

name: Winter Blast
description: Critical shots create an icy blast that inflicts Freeze on enemies within a 4 meter radius. (Cooldown: 3s)

name: Wrath of Moloch
description: Critical hits cause an explosion, dealing X damage and inflicting Burn on enemies within a 5 meter radius. (Cooldown: 3s)
